vocab.meaning: sự hỗ trợ vòm chân tối ưu
vocab.example: I prioritize trainers that provide optimal arch support, as I'm on my feet for the better part of the day.

vocab.meaning: truyền tải một hình ảnh chuyên nghiệp
vocab.example: I often opt for polished leather Oxfords because they help convey a professional image during business meetings.

vocab.meaning: chịu được sự hao mòn/sử dụng hàng ngày
vocab.example: These boots are incredibly robust and can easily withstand daily wear and tear in harsh weather conditions.

vocab.meaning: một điểm nhấn màu sắc nổi bật
vocab.example: I love wearing vibrant sneakers to add a pop of color to an otherwise monochromatic outfit.

vocab.meaning: cân bằng giữa (hai yếu tố đối lập)
vocab.example: Loafers are my go-to choice because they strike a perfect balance between casual comfort and formal style.

vocab.meaning: chất liệu da mềm mại, dẻo dai
vocab.example: The supple leather texture of these handmade shoes ensures they mold perfectly to the shape of my feet.

vocab.meaning: toát lên vẻ lôi cuốn vượt thời gian
vocab.example: Classic Chelsea boots exude a timeless appeal that never seems to go out of fashion.

vocab.meaning: giày dép hiệu năng cao (cho thể thao/vận động)
vocab.example: As an avid runner, I invest heavily in high-performance footwear to prevent long-term joint injuries.
I find that pointed-toe flats really complement my physique by creating the illusion of longer legs.

vocab.meaning: khả năng hút ẩm và thoát mồ hôi
vocab.example: Modern athletic shoes often feature moisture-wicking properties, which are essential for staying comfortable in tropical climates.
